items.title: White House worried about compute limits as it blocks wider access to Anthropic's Mythos
items.raw_content:
The White House has rejected Anthropic's plan to expand access to its AI model Mythos to roughly 70 additional companies, the Wall Street Journal reports. 

The article
items.ai_summary: 白宫因担心算力限制，拒绝Anthropic向约70家公司扩展其AI模型Mythos的访问权限。

items.title: OpenAI says it hit its 10 gigawatt compute goal years ahead of schedule
items.raw_content:
OpenAI says it has reached its goal of 10 gigawatts of AI compute capacity in the United States several years ahead of schedule. 

The article OpenAI says it hit
items.ai_summary: OpenAI提前多年实现10吉瓦AI算力目标。

items.title: Tencent's 440 MB AI model translates 33 languages offline on your phone
items.raw_content:
Tencent has released a compact AI translation model as an open-weight model that it claims outperforms Google Translate and runs completely offline on smartphones.

The article
items.ai_summary: 腾讯发布440MB离线翻译模型，支持33种语言，性能超谷歌翻译。

items.title: Softbank plans IPO for new AI and robotics company valued at up to $100 billion
items.raw_content:
Softbank is planning to launch and take public a new AI and robotics company called Roze in the United States, the Financial Times reports. 

The article
items.ai_summary: 软银计划在美国推出AI和机器人公司Roze并上市，估值高达1000亿美元。

items.title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella says AI success is "more about getting intense users and intense usage" than seat counts
items.raw_content:
Microsoft is posting record profits and strong cloud growth, but just like Google, the company is saying little about how its generative AI business is actually performing.

The article
items.ai_summary: 微软CEO纳德拉表示AI成功关键在于获取密集用户和使用量，而非座位数。

items.title: Google CEO says Pichai says people "love" AI Overviews and keep coming back to search more
items.raw_content:
Alphabet is investing up to $190 billion in AI and cloud infrastructure through 2026, and the company says spending will rise "significantly" again in 2027.

The article
items.ai_summary: 谷歌CEO皮查伊称用户喜爱AI概览，并因此更频繁使用搜索。

items.title: FDA bets on AI and cloud monitoring for clinical trials as it looks to rebuild after DOGE layoffs
items.raw_content:
The FDA is launching a pilot program to monitor clinical trials in real time using AI and cloud computing, a move the agency says could dramatically shorten the time it takes to approve new drugs.

The article
items.ai_summary: FDA启动试点项目，利用AI和云计算实时监控临床试验，旨在缩短新药审批时间。

items.title: Anthropic's new benchmark claims Claude can match human experts in bioinformatics
items.raw_content:
With BioMysteryBench, Anthropic wants to show that Claude can solve real bioinformatics problems at an expert level. The results are promising, but come with important caveats.

The article
items.ai_summary: Anthropic新基准显示Claude在生物信息学领域达到人类专家水平。

items.title: Anthropic reviewing investor offers that would value the company at over $900 billion
items.raw_content:
Anthropic is reviewing investor offers for a new funding round that would value the AI company at over $900 billion, Bloomberg reports. 

The article
items.ai_summary: Anthropic正在评估投资者报价，新一轮融资估值可能超过9000亿美元。

items.title: Mistral's Le Chat spreads Iran war disinformation in 60 percent of leading prompts
items.raw_content: A NewsGuard audit found that Mistral's Le Chat repeats state-sponsored disinformation about the Iran war about half the time. The error rate ra
items.ai_summary: NewsGuard审计显示，Mistral的Le Chat在60%的诱导提示中重复伊朗战争虚假信息，错误率高。
